events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario is clear: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it, work in progress. This is a critical safety hazard under OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Trenches 5 ft or deeper require protective systems (sloping, shoring, shielding) unless excavated in stable rock. Workers must not enter unprotected trenches. This is a fail with critical risk.

Let me construct the JSON.
